name: quit
lambda: lambda p, c, mb: mb.send_to_character(c.id, mb.text_to_message(b"See you next time.\r\n"))
lambda cn: cn.close() if cn is not None and not cn.is_closed() else None
lambda c, rh, cs: rh.to_room(c, c.name+" has disconnected.", cs.get_message("disconnect"))

name: say
lambda: lambda c, ph, msg: ph.to_player(c.id, "You say, '"+msg+"'")
lambda c, cs, rh, msg: rh.to_room(c, msg, cs.get_message("say"))

name: tell
lambda: lambda c, msg, m: c.writer.write(b"You tell {m.get_name()}, '{msg}'\r\n")
lambda c, msg, m, eh: eh.to_mobile(c, c.cmd, m, msg)
usage: lambda c, msg: c.writer.write(b"Invalid target.") if m.invalid_target(msg)

name: examine
lambda: lambda c, ih, mb, msg, usage: ih.print_description(c.id, c.get_fuzzy_item(msg, usage, mb)) if c.get_fuzzy_item(msg, usage, mb) is not None else None
usage: lambda c, mb: mb.send_to_character(c.id, Message(type=MessageType.GAME, data={'text': "You must specify a valid item in your inventory.\r\n"}))

name: north
message: %c has left the room, heading north.

name: look
lambda: lambda c, rh, r: rh.print_room(c.id, r)
